name: Creamy Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the mayonnaise, sugar, vinegar, and oil in a bowl until smooth.
2. Add garlic powder, onion powder, mustard, celery salt, pepper, lemon juice, half and half, and salt to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Pour the dressing over the shredded cabbage in a large bowl.
4. Toss the cabbage until it is evenly coated with the dressing.
